text:
Sorry, this video isn't available any more.

Viewers tuning into the closing ceremonyof the 2024Paris Olympicswere left shocked after a woman lunged atTom Cruise.

The actor, 62, brought Hollywood to the event with a series of impressive stunts, not unlike thosepulled off by his character Ethan Hunt in the Mission: Impossible franchise.

His big moment unfolded as the speeches concluded and US R&B star H.E.R. performed the American national anthem, Stars And Stripes.

During the flag transfer to Los Angeles,which will host the next Games in 2028, Cruise descended from the roof of Stade de France in Paris.

After being suspended on the disc-shaped roof 42metres off the ground, the actor was greeted by a swarm of fans, all desperate for a selfie as he made his way to the stage.

However, one woman’s reaction left some a little unsettled.

As he walked through the crowd, one woman stepped out, attempting to take a selfie with the star.

At the same time, she also wrapped her arms around his neck and went in for a kiss before he turned his face and kept trying to walk straight ahead.

‘How’d that lady almost make out with Tom Cruise on international TV,’ Georgia posted on X.

‘Is this appropriate?’ Cliff commented.

‘Knowing Tom Cruise has been famous since his early 20s and how seamlessly he dodged that kiss, I can’t imagine how many fans and complete strangers have felt entitled to his body over the decades. Like, I’m not being dramatic, WHY are you trying to kiss that man walking by??’ Clare added.

It’s honestly crazy to be like “I’m gonna kiss someone against their will in front of millions of people the world over”. Mary

Some called her actions ‘rude’ while another went so far as to call it ‘harassment’.

After having greeted Olympians in the audience, Cruise went on to shake hands with the mayor of Los Angeles, Karen Bass, before taking the Olympic flag from her.

He then hopped on a motorbike – because, of course – and carried the flag on a joyride out of the stadium.

He’s spent years playing Ethan Hunt in the Mission: Impossible franchise, andTom Cruisebrought Hollywood tothe Olympics closing ceremonywith a series of impressive stunts.

Cruise’s big moment as the speeches concluded and US R&B star H.E.R. performed the American national anthem, Stars And Stripes, on her guitar.

During the flag transfer to Los Angeles, which will host the next Games in 2028, Cruise then descended from the roof ofStade de France in Paristo make the occasion as spectacular as possible.

After being suspended on the disc-shaped roof 42metres off the ground, the actor was greeted by a swarm of fans, all desperate for a selfie as he made his way to the stage.

Having greeted Olympians in the audience, he shook hands with the mayor of Los Angeles, Karen Bass, before taking the Olympic flag from her.

Cruise, 62, then hopped on a motorbike – because, of course – and carried the flag on a joyride out of the stadium.

Just Cruising into the Olympic closing ceremony ðOnly@TomCruisecould make an entrance like this!#Paris2024#bbcolympics#Olympicspic.twitter.com/uoNTeF105g

The ceremony cut to pre-recorded footage of the action star gallivanting around the French capital, zooming past Parisian landmarks like the Eiffel Tower before arriving at an airport.

After boarding the aircraft, Cruise could be seen skydiving out of the plane and later landing in America.

The star then trekked the flag up to the famous Hollywood sign, which had been transformed with Olympic rings, before he passed it on to US cyclist Kate Courtney.

Oh, by the way, he was wearing his trademark leather jacket for all of this, obviously.

Reacting to the segment, viewers took to X in disbelief that Cruise was completing all the stunts while in his sixties.

Cruise himself posted a tweet, sharing a selfie from the roof with the caption: ‘Thank you, Paris! Now off to LA.’

Cruise’s hair-raising stunt series was followed by a much more chilled performance from a series of A-list Californian natives, who offered a taste of what is to come in four years.

After the Olympic flag was passed between several US Olympians, it arrived at the famous beach where the Red Hot Chili Peppers were playing their hit Can’t Stop.

Thank you, Paris! Now off to LA.pic.twitter.com/MxlAb0hZbT

The rock band then handed the stage to Billie Eilish who delivered a sweet rendition of her new track Birds Of A Feather.

Dressed in an oversized T-shirt, shorts, and baseball cap, she was joined by her producer brother, FINNEAS, on guitar.

Finally, Snoop Dogg, who has popped up atvarious events across the Olympics, entered to perform his classic track Drop It Like It’s Hot alongside US fellow rapper Dr Dre.

The event also marked a celebration of the past few weeks of sporting action in Paris and IOC president Thomas Bach quipped that the Olympics had been ‘Seine-sational’.

He said: ‘The Olympic Games Paris 2024 were a celebration of the athletes and sport at its best. The first Olympic Games delivered fully under our Olympic Agenda reforms: younger, more urban, more inclusive, more sustainable.

‘The first-ever Olympic Games with full gender parity.

‘These were sensational Olympic Games from start to finish – or dare I say: Seine-sational Olympic Games.

‘The Olympic Games Paris 2024 were Olympic Games of a new era.’

title: People are horrified after woman lunges at Tom Cruise during Olympics closing ceremony | Metro News
description: Viewers tuning into the closing ceremony of the 2024 Paris Olympics were left shocked after a woman lunged at Tom Cruise.
